channel.title: AI on BeyondElastic
channel.description: Recent content in AI on BeyondElastic

item.title: Microsoft Foundry V2
item.description: Intro # The platform formerly known as Azure AI Foundry has quietly turned into something quite different over the course of this year: a new name, a new portal, and a genuinely new engine under the hood.

item.title: Intro to Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description: Intro # The Microsoft Agent Framework has been around for a while now and, with the 1.

item.title: Azure AI Foundry News & Changes
item.description: Intro # In this short blog post, I want to share with you some of the news and changes from Microsoft Build 2025 around Azure AI Foundry.

item.title: Semantic Kernel Function Calling & Plugins
item.description: Intro # These days, LLMs are not good enough anymore.

item.title: Intro to Model Context Protocol
item.description: Intro # The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is trending!

item.title: Intro to Semantic Kernel and Multi-Agent AI Apps
item.description: Intro # In my last post, I have covered Azure AI Agent Service and how it can be used to easily build and run AI agents on Azure.

item.title: Intro to Azure AI Agent Service
item.description: Intro # AI Agents are in talks, and we are going to take a look at the Azure AI Agent Service.
